What is evil? Whatever springs from weakness.
It takes a great talent and skill to conceal one's talent and skill.
Man is an animal that makes bargains: no other animal does this - no dog exchanges bones with another.
We should not be upset that others hide the truth from us, when we hide it so often from ourselves.
There are two kinds of lies; one concerns an accomplished fact, the other concerns a future duty.
Nothing is as dangerous as an ignorant friend; a wise enemy is to be preferred.
Abandon all hope, ye who enter here.
Man is condemned to be free.
Every man has in himself the most dangerous traitor of all.
What people commonly call fate is mostly their own stupidity.
Genius lives only one story above madness.
Remember to keep a clear head in difficult times.
There are two main human sins from which all the others derive: impatience and indolence.
The greatest souls are capable of the greatest vices as well as of the greatest virtues.
The material has to be created.
Every failure is a step to success.
Adversity is the first path to truth.
To doubt everything or to believe everything are two equally convenient solutions; both dispense with the necessity of reflection.
The wound is at her heart.
If you make a mistake and do not correct it, this is called a mistake.
People, often deceived by an illusive good, desire their own ruin.
A man who cannot command himself will always be a slave.
Force without wisdom falls of its own weight.
The worst enemy you can meet will always be yourself.
The strongest principle of growth lies in the human choice.
Man never forgets what he wants to forget.
To work you have the right, but not to the fruits thereof.
It is better to receive an injury than to inflict one.
People will do anything, no matter how absurd, in order to avoid facing their own souls
Those who cannot remember the past are condemned to repeat it.
The first cause of absurd conclusions I ascribe to the want of method.
There is only one rule in love: bring happiness to those you love.
Change your desires rather than the order of the world.

title: Medaka Kuroiwa is Impervious to My Charms
franchise: Medaka Kuroiwa is Impervious to My Charms

episodes.name: No, don't open it so wide please...
"Just whip it out now!" ...can I say that?
Ah, This is My First Time Having Two at Once...
S-so this is how it goes, huh...
It tore... What do I do?!
D-don't show this to anyone else, okay?
Jeez... I can't get my mind off of it...
I-I'm not saying you can take it that far!
I told you, not so suddenly!!
I can't... take it... any longer!
Say what you want; famous games are usually fun
It feels awesome to gain a bunch of levels after a battle
When a girl’s your first friend, life feels like a date for a while
Sometimes you conquer a dungeon only to find a strong boss back in your village
The characters who become your friends after you clear a hard event usually have high stats
Once you start speedrunning the minigames, you seriously can’t stop
When a mentor character becomes a boss, they’ll push you to the edge
There are some problems a bottom-tier character can’t fix alone
When you go back to the starter town with the full party, new stuff tends to happen
Multiplayer games have their own special appeal
A single choice can change everything
Equipment for girls has special effects
The best games make reconnaissance fun
A happy ending doesn't mean this game is over
Battles go better when you're fighting alongside someone whose signature move is the opposite of yours
Villagers have their own way of life
If you keep upgrading your initial equipment, it'll usually become your most powerful weapon
Everyone has different expectations about a big event
Important items are usually lying around in enchanted forests
Sometimes the main character can't enter the village of another species on his own
If you don't make up your mind, the story won't advance
The patterns carved into the stone tablet are connected to the mysteries of the world
Even fairies feel lonely when they're away from their spring by themselves
Sometimes the ancient tome in the first town is the key to the final dungeon
You're sure to find what you want on the other side of the magic door
